title: HEALTH CARE SERVICES - 211info
text: NEHALEM BAY HEALTH CENTER AND PHARMACY HEALTH CARE SERVICES Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides patient-centered health care, including annual exams, gynecological exams, care for acute and chronic conditions, pregnancy testing, immunizations, well-child exams, sports physicals, naturopathic medicine, acupuncture, mental health counseling, medication-assisted treatment, health education classes, health screenings and community wellness classes and groups. Assists with health insurance enrollment (OHP and private insurance) through the Federal Health Exchange. Prescription assistance program available for established patients. 885 Nehalem Boulevard Wheeler, OR 97147 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: Clinic: Monday-Friday 8am-6pm Pharmacy: Monday-Friday 9am-5:30pm Email (800) 368-5182 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (800) 368-5182 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call for information and to schedule an appointment FEES: Accepts Oregon Health Plan, Medicare, and most private insurance plans. Sliding scale fee available. DOCUMENTS: Insurance information, if applicable. Income information if applying for sliding scale fees. LANGUAGES: English, Spanish AREA SERVED: Clatsop and Tillamook Counties Services: Childhood Immunization Community Clinics General Medical Care Mental Health Evaluation Navigator Programs Pap Tests Physical Activity and Fitness Education/Promotion Sports Participation Physical Examinations Vaccine Information Other Services Offered At This Location: HEALTH SCREENING/DIAGNOSTIC SERVICES - SCREENWISE-ENROLLING If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. NEHALEM BAY HEALTH CENTER AND PHARMACY
